# Phase-05 — Modern Data Engineering & Lakehouse

> Build the lakehouse and batch platforms at the heart of modern data engineering.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 18-22**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Modern Data Stack Overview](01_Modern_Data_Stack_Overview.prompt.md) | `Modern_Data_Stack_Overview.md` | 45 min + 2h |
| 02 | [Lakehouse Architecture](02_Lakehouse_Architecture.prompt.md) | `Lakehouse_Architecture.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 03 | [Medallion Architecture](03_Medallion_Architecture.prompt.md) | `Medallion_Architecture.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 04 | [Apache Spark Internals](04_Apache_Spark_Internals.prompt.md) | `Apache_Spark_Internals.md` | 90 min + 6h |
| 05 | [Databricks Platform](05_Databricks_Platform.prompt.md) | `Databricks_Platform.md` | 75 min + 6h |
| 06 | [Azure Data Factory and Synapse](06_Azure_Data_Factory_and_Synapse.prompt.md) | `Azure_Data_Factory_and_Synapse.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 07 | [Microsoft Fabric](07_Microsoft_Fabric.prompt.md) | `Microsoft_Fabric.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 08 | [dbt and Analytics Engineering](08_dbt_and_Analytics_Engineering.prompt.md) | `dbt_and_Transformation.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 09 | [Batch Pipeline Design](09_Batch_Pipeline_Design.prompt.md) | `Batch_Pipeline_Design.md` | 60 min + 4h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
